mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, base_url, api_key, model_name, is_active, sort_order, created_time, updated_time FROM model_config WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT id, name, code, base_url, api_key, model_name, is_active, sort_order, created_time, updated_time FROM model_config WHERE code = #{code} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
